name: Paycor
tagline: AI-enhanced HCM platform with unified payroll and HR tools
description: Paycor is a human capital management platform built for small to mid-sized businesses that want to modernize their HR and payroll operations. Its AI capabilities include predictive analytics for turnover, automated payroll processing, intelligent recruiting, and workforce management optimization. Paycor unifies payroll, HR, benefits, talent management, and workforce management into a single platform.
